Sidqly is a verified giving operations platform tailored exclusively for Islamic charities, mosques, Qurbani organizers, Zakat committees, and Sadaqah campaign teams.

Sidqly helps these teams move away from manual spreadsheets and scattered messaging groups by providing structured workflows for manual payment review, proof approval, dignity-safe donor updates, fund separation, and board-ready reporting.

# Main Product Categories / Features
- Verified Giving & Donation Operations
- Manual Payment Verification Workflows
- Proof Trust Engine (Dignity-safe face blurring, internal approval queues)
- Board-Ready Reporting Dashboard
- Fund Separation (Zakat vs Sadaqah)
- Qurbani & Ramadan Operations Tracking

# Use Cases
- Mosques & Masjids
- Islamic Charities
- Zakat Committees
- Qurbani Organizers
- Sadaqah Campaign Teams
